params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, Winback_Pilot__c, Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId, Amount DESC LIMIT 2000

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, RecordType.Name, Winback_Pilot__c, Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) ORDER BY OwnerId, Amount DESC LIMIT 2000
